blended.narrative: Smugglers Notch is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. The 14-day outlook shows 10 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 61°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Thursday: light rain showers, highs of 56°F.
Saturday: 2.4" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tuesday: 2.9" of snow, highs of 41°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
